headline: First Solar (FSLR) Is Up 9.3% After Record Q1 Results And Reaffirmed 2026 Outlook Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In April 2026, First Solar reported first‑quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$1,044.24 million and net income of US$346.62 million, with earnings per share rising year on year and full‑year 2026 guidance for US$4.9 billion to US$5.2 billion in net sales reaffirmed. Alongside record first‑quarter revenue, the company highlighted margin expansion supported by U.S. manufacturing tax credits, strong facility utilization, and a 47.9 GW contracted backlog that extends revenue visibility...

headline: Why Enphase (ENPH) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of home energy technology company Enphase (NASDAQ:ENPH) jumped 4% in the afternoon session after positive sentiment swept through the solar sector as competitor First Solar reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, boosting investor confidence across the industry.
